config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to PlanetScale
2. Go to Organization Settings → Service Tokens
3. Create a service token with read_databases and read_organization permissions
4. Copy the Token ID and Token Value separately
5. Enter your Organization name (from app.planetscale.com/YOUR-ORG) and the token fields below

credentialFields.label: Service Token ID
credentialFields.helpText: PlanetScale → Settings → Service Tokens → your token → Token ID

credentialFields.label: Service Token Value
credentialFields.helpText: PlanetScale → Settings → Service Tokens → your token → Token Value

checks.name: App Availability
checks.description: Verifies PlanetScale is reachable and the service token is valid

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Lists PlanetScale organization members to verify database access is managed

checks.name: Encryption at Rest
checks.description: Confirms PlanetScale is in use — PlanetScale encrypts all data at rest by default using AES-256
